scripts.install:all: npm --prefix apps/api install && npm --prefix apps/web install
scripts.prisma:push: npm --prefix apps/api exec prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && npm run api:env && npm run install:all && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:push && npm run seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
